name: Chelsea
description: A 30-minute EMOM of a small pull-up, push-up, and air-squat triplet, testing whether an athlete can hold pace and quality for a full half hour rather than sprint a shorter piece.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
